query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agent_connections` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `agent_id` int NOT NULL,
  `connected_agent_id` int NOT NULL,
  `status` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'active',
  `connection_type` varchar(100) DEFAULT 'peer',
  `metadata` json,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `analytics_summary` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `platform` varchar(100),
  `total_views` int DEFAULT 0,
  `total_engagement` int DEFAULT 0,
  `total_shares` int DEFAULT 0,
  `total_comments` int DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `broadcast_schedule` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `channel_id` int,
  `title` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `start_time` timestamp,
  `end_time` timestamp,
  `status` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'scheduled',
  `content_type` varchar(100),
  `content_url` text,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bulk_schedule_templates` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `template_data` json,
  `created_by` int,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `content_calendar_posts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `content` text,
  `platform` varchar(100),
  `scheduled_at` timestamp,
  `status` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'draft',
  `media_urls` json,
  `hashtags` json,
  `created_by` int,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `custom_stations` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `genre` varchar(100),
  `theme_color` varchar(20),
  `logo_url` text,
  `is_public` tinyint DEFAULT 1,
  `listener_count` int DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `decision_logs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `decision_id` varchar(255),
  `policy_id` varchar(255),
  `action` varchar(255),
  `result` text,
  `confidence` decimal(5,2),
  `metadata` json,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `file_access_logs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `file_id` int NOT NULL,
  `user_id` int,
  `action` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `ip_address` varchar(45),
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `platform_engagement_metrics` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `platform` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `impressions` int DEFAULT 0,
  `clicks` int DEFAULT 0,
  `engagement_rate` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `followers_gained` int DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `station_content_sources` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `station_id` int NOT NULL,
  `source_type` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `source_url` text,
  `is_active` tinyint DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `station_playback_history` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `station_id` int NOT NULL,
  `track_title` varchar(500),
  `artist` varchar(255),
  `played_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `duration` int,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user_station_preferences` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `station_id` int NOT NULL,
  `is_favorite` tinyint DEFAULT 0,
  `volume` int DEFAULT 80,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
